import io
import string
import list

fn parse_ints(_ line: String) -> List<Int>
  mut result: List<Int> = []
  mut i = 0
  let n = string.len(line)
  mut have = false
  mut sign = 1
  mut val = 0
  while i < n
    let b = match string.byte_at(line, i)
            when Some(x)
              x
            when None
              0
            end
    if b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 13
      if have
        result = list.push(result, val * sign)
        have = false
        sign = 1
        val = 0
      end
    else if b == 45
      if have
        val = val
      else
        sign = -1
        have = true
      end
    else
      if b >= 48 and b <= 57
        have = true
        val = val * 10 + (b - 48)
      end
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  if have
    result = list.push(result, val * sign)
  end
  result
end

fn solve(_ line1: String, _ line2: String) -> Unit
  mut all: List<Int> = parse_ints(line1)
  let bs = parse_ints(line2)
  let bn = list.len(bs)
  mut i = 0
  while i < bn
    match list.get(bs, i)
    when Some(v)
      all = list.push(all, v)
    when None
      ()
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  let total = list.len(all)
  if total == 0
    println("")
  else
    match list.min(all)
    when Some(m)
      mut output = "#{m}"
      mut last = m
      mut done = false
      while not done
        mut has_best = false
        mut best = 0
        mut j = 0
        while j < total
          match list.get(all, j)
          when Some(v)
            if v > last
              if has_best
                if v < best
                  best = v
                end
              else
                best = v
                has_best = true
              end
            end
          when None
            ()
          end
          j = j + 1
        end
        if has_best
          output = "#{output} #{best}"
          last = best
        else
          done = true
        end
      end
      println(output)
    when None
      println("")
    end
  end
end

let l1 = match io.read_line()
         when Some(s)
           s
         when None
           ""
         end
let l2 = match io.read_line()
         when Some(s)
           s
         when None
           ""
         end
solve(l1, l2)
